info.title: Maallem API
info.description:
Maallem backend — Authentication, Profiles, Projects & Proposals.

**Production:** https://maallem-backend.vercel.app

**Auth:** Register/login, refresh token, profile (`/me`).

**Profiles:** Public listing by ID; worker/company manage their profile via `/worker/me` and `/company/me` (multipart for images).

**Projects:** Clients (`user` role) post and manage projects. Public listing and details.

**Proposals:** Workers submit proposals on open projects. Clients accept/reject proposals.

**Chat:** Clients start conversations with workers; both can list conversations, send/receive messages (text, image, or file), and mark messages as read.

**Users (Client Dashboard):** Single private endpoint aggregating the client's projects, pending proposals, conversations, and summary stats.

**AI Estimation:** Analyze a natural-language task description (Arabic/English), extract dimensions via OpenAI, then compute quantities and pricing using a rule engine and internal material prices (no supplier contact).

tags.name: Projects (Worker)
tags.description: Worker role — assigned projects + Bearer token

tags.name: Users (Client)
tags.description: Client (`user` role) private dashboard + Bearer token

tags.name: Notifications
tags.description: User notifications (read, delete, list, unread count) + Bearer token

tags.name: Bookings
tags.description: Agreement and Escrow payment workflow between Client and Worker

tags.name: AI
tags.description: AI-powered task analysis and cost estimation (OpenAI extraction + rule engine)

refreshToken.description: Optional — removes specific refresh token from device

WorkerProfileBody.description: Use as multipart/form-data fields (text). Arrays can be comma-separated or JSON string.

specializations.description: JSON array or comma-separated, e.g. ["سباكة","كهرباء"] or سباكة,كهرباء

location.description: JSON object or plain address, e.g. {"address":"...","city":"القاهرة"}

knownWorkerName.description: Worker who referred or is known to this worker

removePortfolioImages.description: URLs to remove (JSON array or single URL) — update only

worker.description: Targeted worker (User _id) when project is sent directly to a worker

description.example: تسريب في الحمام يحتاج إصلاح عاجل

isDirect.description: True when the project was sent directly to a specific worker (private, not in public listing)

workerId.description: Worker User _id or Worker profile _id — when set, the worker is notified automatically

myProposal.description: This worker's proposal on the project, if any

id.description: Project _id for direct requests, Proposal _id for submitted offers

status.description: Accepting a proposal sets the project to `in-progress` and rejects other pending proposals.

projectId.description: Optional project to link to the conversation

pendingProposals.description: Flat list of pending proposals across all projects (action items)

SendMessageBody.description: Send as **multipart/form-data**. For text messages provide `content`. For image/file messages upload `file` (images set type `image`, other files set type `file`).

message.example: Ahmad Mohammad submitted a proposal on your project "تصليح سباكة"

description.example: أريد دهان غرفة 4×5 متر وارتفاعها 3 متر
description.description: Natural language description of the task (Arabic or English)

estimatedArea.description: Wall area (painting), floor area (ceramic), or bathroom area (plumbing) in m²

get.description: Returns user with populated `workerProfile` and `companyProfile` if set.

post.description: Requires `worker` role. Send as **multipart/form-data** if uploading images.
Requires `company` role. **multipart/form-data** for logo and project images.

get.description: No authentication required. Returns **public** projects only (excludes direct/private projects sent to a specific worker). Filter by status, city, or category.

post.description: Requires `user` role (Client). When `workerId` is provided, the project is **direct/private** — visible only to the client and that worker, and excluded from public project listing.

get.description: Requires `worker` role. Returns projects where the client sent the project directly to this worker, including the worker's own proposal (`myProposal`) and a status summary. Filter by `status` query param.

200.description: Assigned projects for the authenticated worker

get.description: Public projects are visible to everyone. **Direct/private** projects (with `worker` assigned) require authentication as the client or assigned worker.

put.description: Requires `user` role. Only the project owner can update.

delete.description: Requires `user` role. Only the project owner can delete. Also deletes all related proposals.

patch.description: Requires `user` or `worker` role. The project owner (client) or the assigned worker can change status (e.g. worker moves project to `in-progress` when starting, or `closed` when done).

get.description: Requires `user` role. Only the project owner can view proposals.

post.summary: Submit a proposal on a project
post.description: Requires `worker` role. Project must be `open`. One proposal per worker per project.

400.description: Project is not open for proposals

409.description: Already submitted a proposal for this project

get.description: Requires `worker` role. Returns all proposals submitted by the authenticated worker.

Requires `worker` role. Returns a unified timeline of everything related to this worker: direct client requests (`direct_request` / `awaiting_proposal`), submitted proposals (`pending`), accepted, rejected, and withdrawn offers. Optional filters: `status`, `clientId`.

parameters.name: clientId
parameters.description: Filter history for a specific client User _id

put.description: Requires `worker` role. Only pending proposals can be updated.

400.description: Only pending proposals can be updated

delete.description: Requires `worker` role. Only pending proposals can be withdrawn.

400.description: Only pending proposals can be withdrawn

patch.description: Requires `user` role. Only the project owner can accept/reject. Accepting sets the project to `in-progress` and rejects other pending proposals.

400.description: Only pending proposals can be accepted or rejected

get.description: Requires `user` role. **Private** — returns all data for the authenticated client in one response: profile, project stats, projects with nested proposals (pending + accepted), a flat list of pending proposals needing action, and chat conversations with unread counts.

post.description: Requires `user` role. Returns an existing conversation with the worker or creates a new one. One conversation per client–worker pair.

get.description: Requires `user` or `worker` role. Returns conversations sorted by most recent message.
Requires `user` or `worker` role. Only participants can access. Messages are returned oldest first.

403.description: Not a participant in this conversation

post.description: Requires `user` or `worker` role. Text: send `content` in multipart or JSON body. Image/file: upload `file` field (multipart). Triggers a real-time event via Pusher.

400.description: Message content is required (for text messages)

403.description: Not a participant in this conversation

patch.description: Requires `user` or `worker` role. Marks unread messages from the other participant as read and resets your unread count. Notifies the other participant via Pusher.

403.description: Not a participant in this conversation

get.description: Returns paginated list of notifications for the authenticated user, sorted by newest first.
Returns the total number of unread notifications for the authenticated user.

patch.description: Marks all unread notifications of the authenticated user as read.

200.description: All notifications marked as read successfully

patch.summary: Mark a single notification as read
patch.description: Marks a specific notification of the authenticated user as read.

delete.description: Deletes a specific notification belonging to the authenticated user.

post.description: Authorizes subscription to private channels: `private-user-{userId}` for notifications, or `private-conversation-{conversationId}` for chats. The authenticated user must be a participant or the recipient to successfully authorize.

403.description: Forbidden — user is not authorized to subscribe to this channel

post.description: Requires `user` role. Creates a new booking in `pending_payment` status.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of bookings. For clients, returns bookings they created. For workers/companies, returns bookings assigned to them. For admins, returns all bookings.
Returns full details of a specific booking. Allowed for the client, the provider, or admin users.

post.description: Requires `user` role. Charges the client, places the funds in platform escrow, and changes status to `paid`.

post.summary: Deliver work (Mark as completed by provider)
post.description: Requires `worker` or `company` role. Changes the booking status to `delivered`.

400.description: Work can only be delivered after payment

post.description: Requires `user` role. Releases the escrowed funds to the provider's balance (minus the 10% platform commission) and sets status to `completed`.

400.description: Booking is not in delivered status

post.description: Allowed for client or provider. Sets the booking status to `disputed` for admin mediation.

400.description: Dispute can only be opened for paid or delivered bookings

post.summary: Analyze task description and estimate cost
post.description:
No authentication required.

**Flow:**
1. OpenAI extracts structured dimensions from the description (JSON only — no calculations).
2. Rule engine computes areas, material quantities, and labor hours.
3. BOQ is generated from estimation rules.
4. Material prices are fetched from MongoDB (`materialprices` collection).
5. Total cost is calculated and the estimation is saved to `aiestimations`.

**Supported service types:** `painting`, `ceramic`, `plumbing`.

value.description: أريد دهان غرفة 4×5 متر وارتفاعها 3 متر
أريد أعمال سباكة لحمام 6 متر مربع

404.description: Material price not found in database (run seed:materials first)

422.description: Validation failed or could not extract dimensions from description

502.description: OpenAI returned invalid or empty response

get.description: Requires authentication. Retrieves the history of all AI estimations requested by the authenticated user or worker.

post.description: Requires `admin` role. Resolves the dispute. If `refund`, releases escrow to client's balance. If `release`, releases escrow (after commission) to provider's balance.

400.description: Booking is not in disputed status or invalid resolution

post.description: Creates milestones/releases. The total amount must equal the booking price.
Requires user (client) role. Approves release and transfers funds.

post.summary: Get AI recommendations based on user story
post.description: Requires Bearer token. Analyzes the user's problem description using OpenAI, extracts the required service type and city, and returns a list of recommended workers from the database.

story.example: أنا ساكن في القاهرة وعندي مشكلة في مواسير المطبخ بتسرب مياه

messageAr.example: لقد قمنا بتحديد الخدمة كأعمال سباكة بسبب وجود تسريب في المياه...

post.summary: Add a review for a worker

get.summary: Get all reviews for a worker
Get all todos for the user
